text:
Once upon a time in a lush, green forest, there was a magical garden where flowers of all colors bloomed and trees whispered secrets to each other. In the heart of this garden lived a curious kitten named Whisker. Whisker was not like other kittens; she had eyes that sparkled like sapphires and fur as soft as velvet.

One sunny morning, as the sun cast golden rays through the leaves, Whisker noticed a tiny bird perched on a branch, its feathers matted and wet. The bird seemed weak and frightened. Whisker, always kind, decided to help her new friend.

She crept closer, gently touching the bird's head with her paw. The bird, sensing Whisker’s kindness, opened its eyes and chirped softly. Whisker knew exactly what to do.
